label: Designator dropdown group
description: Defines a build-menu dropdown group that clusters multiple buildable defs into a single expandable button in the Architect panel.

iconSource.label: Icon source
iconSource.description: Determines how the dropdown button icon is chosen. Cost uses the highest market-value ingredient icon; Placed uses the placed designator icon.

useGridMenu.label: Use grid menu
useGridMenu.description: If true, the dropdown opens a grid-style menu instead of a float menu when any contained place designator belongs to this group.

includeEyeDropperTool.label: Include eye dropper tool
includeEyeDropperTool.description: If true and the dropdown contains terrain designators, the floor color eyedropper option is included.

basic-dropdown-group.label: Basic dropdown group
basic-dropdown-group.description: Minimal designator dropdown group with a def name and label.
